story: As a shopper, I want to Signup for the ecommerce store.

cases.title: Display Signup page on button click
cases.when: User clicks the Sign Up button
cases.then: The SIGNup page with Create account is displayed

cases.title: Signup form accepts full name, email, and password
cases.when: User enters full name, email, and password
cases.then: The input fields for full name, email, and password are non-empty

cases.title: Create account on clicking create account button
cases.given: User has entered valid full name, email, and password
cases.when: User clicks the create account button
cases.then: A new account is created and stored in localStorage under 'nova_users'
